# Dudley Development

> Dudley Development is an independent iOS app studio. We build small, polished, playful apps for iPhone — mostly funny, sometimes useful. Every app is free, runs without an account, and keeps your data on your device. Founded and run by Nicholas Santulli.

## Apps

- [Powell Prowl: Rate Chase](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/apps/powell-prowl/): A free satirical iPhone arcade game — a 31-level whack-and-chase romp through a parody of Federal Reserve interest-rate drama. Live on the App Store. Requires iOS 16.6+.
- [Vibe Rater](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/apps/vibe-rater/): A free iPhone entertainment app that rates your vibe from a photo. Get your archetype (Main Character, Final Boss, Quiet Luxury, Cottagecore, and more), an aura color, and a six-dimension scorecard. The phone vibrates while it reads you. Photos stay on your device. Launching on the App Store soon.

## Archetypes (Vibe Rater)

Vibe Rater assigns one of several vibe archetypes based on your photo:

- [Main Character Energy](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/main-character/): The protagonist of every room. Confident, intentional presence.
- [Final Boss](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/final-boss/): Peak power. Effortless authority; maxed Main-Character, Rizz, and Serve.
- [Quiet Luxury](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/quiet-luxury/): Understated, expensive elegance with no loud logos.
- [Clean Girl](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/clean-girl/): Minimal, polished, effortless — glowy skin and gold hoops.
- [Dark Academia](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/dark-academia/): Old libraries, tweed, candlelight, intellectual mood.
- [Cottagecore](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/cottagecore/): Soft, rural, slow living. High Aura, peaceful energy.
- [Cozy Goblin](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/cozy-goblin/): Maximally comfortable, endearingly chaotic. Zero Serve, infinite Aura.
- [Rizz](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/archetypes/rizz/): Natural charisma and social magnetism.

## Tools

- [What's My Vibe? Quiz](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/tools/whats-my-vibe/): A free 5-question quiz that reveals your vibe archetype. Powered by Vibe Rater logic.

## Comparisons

- [Best Photo Rating Apps for iPhone (2026)](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/compare/best-photo-rating-apps/): An honest comparison of photo, vibe, and aura rating apps on iPhone.
- [Best Vibe Check Apps for iPhone (2026)](https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/compare/vibe-check-apps/): An honest comparison of vibe check and aura apps on iPhone.

## About

Dudley Development is run by a small team and one human (Nicholas Santulli). All apps are free with Google AdMob ads. No accounts required. No first-party analytics or trackers. No user data collected beyond what AdMob requires for ads, and tracking can be declined.

## Contact

- Support: nicksantulli@yahoo.com
- Privacy policies: https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/privacy/
- Website: https://nicksantulli.github.io/dudley-web/

Note: a custom domain (dudleydevelopment.com) is planned; until then the canonical site is the github.io URL above.
